title: RailRoad
description: RailRoad is a modification that adds an endless railroad to the world of Minecraft
body:
### This mod brings to your Minecraft world an 
## ENDLESS RAILWAY
![Appearance on flat terrain](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b18808a5c62b7f4f9a5748d21d6810d8650db04d.png)
### A NEW AWARENESS OF GENERATION
It is essentially a puzzle-structure, like villages, but it is constantly adding new segments that operate according to their own logic, reacting to any changes in terrain ahead
![Different segments for different terrain](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3b3048f7c1ddba33c5df4a72c88d5c6bef01d8b2.png)
### HIGH COMPATIBILITY AND SECURITY
The mod minimally affects blocks and removes the spawn feature only within its width. It also does not affect on already created worlds without this mod
![Minimal affect on Minecraft world](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7ca50ae3a4f9fe8f4a17315811dfda700ae59490.png)
### CUSTOM STRUCTURES
Throughout the world, you can find abandoned buildings with unique loot, such as original/create items, components or food
![Structure[Tower]](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/561f57a76d54e5b793ef7bc1332432233c18ab8c.png)
